1.diagnosis: Program initialization: zero prior experiments in experiment_log.jsonl. Before any scientific steering claim on Gemma, the harness itself must clear Rung-0 (UNIT/plumbing) of the benchmark ladder (CLAUDE.md §4, corpus/steering-tiered-benchmark-ladder-4090.md): the intervention must measurably change the residual stream and logits, special tokens must be excluded, removing the vector must restore state exactly, and the full autoresearch loop (pre-run reasoning → runner → experiment_log.jsonl → best_config.json → reasoning verdict → rich 3-tier dashboard) must execute end-to-end and produce auditable artifacts. This is the gate that 90% of bad ideas die at in minutes; we validate it on the offline FakeResidualLM stub so no Gemma/network dependency blocks the plumbing check.
1.citations: Korznikov, Galichin, Dontsov, Rogov, Oseledets, Tutubalina, 2026 ICML 'The Rogue Scalpel: Activation Steering Compromises LLM Safety' (arXiv:2509.22067) — establishes that off-manifold displacement at the injection layer is the damage mechanism, motivating the Rung-0 assertions that ‖Δh‖>0 is measurable and that state restoration is exact (no residual contamination). Panickssery, Gabrieli, Schulz, Tong, Hubinger, Turner, 2024 ACL 'Steering Llama 2 via Contrastive Activation Addition' (arXiv:2312.06681) — the difference-of-means residual-stream addition operation whose mechanics the intervention library implements and which Rung-0 verifies actually perturbs the stream.
1.hypothesis: Because the residual stream is an additive bus (corpus first-principles §Step 0), injecting alpha*v at a residual layer via a forward hook must change the hidden state by ‖Δh‖>0 and move the logits, while the SteeringContext must remove the hook on exit and restore the baseline forward pass exactly (allclose). Mechanism: the hook adds to the layer output tensor only at non-special-token positions; on exit the handle is removed so the module reverts to its native forward. I predict the runner completes a Rung-0/1 fake-model experiment, writes a valid append-only JSONL row with the fingerprinted composite, sets KEEP (first row beats the -inf global best), and regenerates the master + per-experiment dashboard pages with no markdown leakage.
